description: openaiops-platform feature ledger. Cross-session contract; status transitions are real product gates.
source: Pivoted from archived OpenAIOps repo per its ADR-0007 (2026-05-24).

history.event: Repo created + features.json with SLICE-0 (status: building)
SLICE-0 done — CI green, 8/8 ACs verified (AC-7 partial: goose down not auto-tested)
PRE-1 resolved — ADR-0002 chose ch-migrate service (Option B); scaffold landed + smoke verified

features.title: Foundation — repo skeleton + docker-compose stack + multi-tenant gateway shell

evidence.ac_summary: 8 ACs total: 7 PASS + 1 PARTIAL (AC-7: goose down rollback exists as SQL but not auto-tested in CI; manually verifiable via `goose -dir backend/migrations postgres ... down`).
evidence.spec_compliance_runs: 8 spec reviews + 7 code quality reviews dispatched during execution; 1 review-driven fix loop on T1 (vendor gitignore + seed/smoke README accuracy) and 4 CI iteration cycles on T14.
bugs_caught_during_execution: T13 nginx.conf missing /api proxy block — would have silently 'authenticated' with empty tenant data; caught when CI E2E ran
T14 NaiveUI NInput wraps actual <input> in a div with data-testid; tests needed .locator('input') to drill in
T14 Node 25 stripped Storage.clear(); jsdom shim added

features.current_state: Empty repo just created. No code, no infra, no auth.
features.target_state: Engineer can `docker-compose up`, get a stack with PG/Redis/CH/Collector/Caddy/gateway/frontend; curl `/healthz` with a Bearer key returns tenant_id; browser shows Login page (中/英 switchable); CI green.
acceptance_criteria: docker-compose up brings stack to healthy state (all services)
curl with valid Bearer API key on /healthz returns 200 + tenant_id JSON
curl without / with wrong key returns 401
two tenants seeded; each key resolves to its own tenant (no cross-talk)
Login page renders in zh-CN by default; can switch to en-US
After login, Home page shows tenant name in top bar
goose migrate up creates 3 tables; down rolls back cleanly
GitHub Actions CI (backend / frontend-unit / e2e) is green on push
out_of_scope: AI agents / RCA (Phase 2 sibling repo openaiops-ai)
Production hardening (TLS termination beyond local Caddy, observability of platform itself, etc.)
features.actual_effort_session: 1 autonomous subagent-driven session (~3h wall time, 14 task implementer + 11 reviewer + 2 fixer subagent dispatches)
features.notes: All 14 tasks in the plan traced to this single feature (per harness-engineering subagent grounding rule). Future slices (SLICE-1 Trace E2E etc.) will get their own feature entries. See ADR-0001 §5 for the slice roadmap.
slice_1_prerequisites: PRE-1 RESOLVED 2026-05-24: ClickHouse schema migration mechanism — Option B (dedicated ch-migrate service) per ADR-0002. Scaffold + smoke verified.
Decide Query API deployment shape (extend gateway binary vs new backend/cmd/query/ service per ADR-0001 §3.2) — tracked as PRE-2
Implement MustTenantScope query builder + CH Row Policy + cross-tenant E2E reverse tests BEFORE first real CH write (ADR-0001 §3.3) — tracked as PRE-3

features.title: Trace ingest 端到端 — OTel processor + Go ingester + CH traces_v1 + query API + Traces page
features.current_state: Slice 0 stack runs; OTel Collector has only debug exporter; no CH tables; no /api/v1/traces endpoint; frontend Traces page does not exist.
features.target_state: Run OTel demo (hot-r.o.d. or similar) → traces written to CH traces_v1 (tenant-scoped) → curl /api/v1/traces returns waterfall JSON → frontend /traces page renders list + detail with cross-jump to logs (Slice 2). Two tenants verified to not see each others traces (cross-tenant E2E reverse test).
acceptance_criteria: OTel Collector custom processor (Go) reads tenant.id from OTLP resource attribute or 'X-Tenant-Id' header on HTTP receiver; rejects spans missing tenant.id with 400/dropped + metric

CH traces_v1 table created (tenant_id LowCardinality(String), trace_id, span_id, parent_span_id, service, operation, ts DateTime64(9), duration UInt64, attributes Map(String,String), status, span_kind); ORDER BY (tenant_id, service, ts) PARTITION BY (tenant_id, toYYYYMMDD(ts))
Go ingester service: receives OTLP from Collector, writes batches to CH traces_v1, propagates tenant_id from processor
Query API: GET /api/v1/traces (list with filters: service/operation/ts range/min_duration) + GET /api/v1/traces/{trace_id} (waterfall structure with all spans)
All Query API SQL goes through MustTenantScope(ctx, q) helper (PRE-3); attempting bare SQL fails a lint or build check
ClickHouse Row Policy enforces tenant_id filter at CH level (defense-in-depth on top of builder)
Frontend /traces page (Vue): list (sortable by ts/duration) + detail waterfall + JSON / Service Map subtabs (port from openapm/js/pages-traces.js)
Cross-tenant E2E reverse test: tenant A ingests trace, tenant B queries with own key → 0 results (no cross-talk)
Per-ingest metering event written to PG metering_events (tenant_id, signal_type='trace', count=spans_in_batch)
Slice 1 CI matrix: all backend tests pass + new ch-related integration test + frontend Traces page Playwright spec green
out_of_scope: Trace search via attribute index (post-MVP — for now ts-range scan)
features.plan: (to be written via /harness:writing-plans — should produce docs/plans/YYYY-MM-DD-slice-1-plan.md)
features.notes: Per Slice 0 plan §5, this is the first vertical slice. Path B (vertical slice) discipline: ship a complete demo-able Trace flow before starting SLICE-2 Logs. Plan to use OTel hot-r.o.d. demo as data source (NOT old repo's simulator-service). Slice 0 lessons (docs/lessons-learned-2026-05-24.md) apply — particularly nginx /api proxy discipline and NaiveUI test selectors.
